svg.title: CCV Mode Bypass — OP_SUCCESS via Undefined Flags
svg.desc: Animated diagram showing how a single-byte encoding error in a CCV vault script triggers OP_SUCCESS, completely bypassing all covenant checks and enabling total fund theft. Side-by-side comparison of correct (mode=0) vs buggy (mode=3) vault.
svg.text: IDENTICAL ON CHAIN — ONE BYTE DIFFERENCE

g.text: TM8 is unique to CCV — the OP_SUCCESS fallback is a design choice for soft-fork upgradability

svg.text: CCV Mode Bypass — OP_SUCCESS via Undefined Flags
TM8: A single-byte encoding error completely bypasses all covenant checks
